settings.heading: Choosing your Piercing
settings.subheading:
From sleek minimalism to bold statement piercings, there is a fit for every individual's style. Here is a quick overview of the different types of lip piercings which also aims to help you make an informed decision when choosing to pierce your lips. These piercings often appeal to those who know exactly what they’re looking for and appreciate unique styles.

JEWELLERY: Flatback Studs, Ball End Studs

STANDARD SIZE: 16G (1.2mm) and 18G (1.0mm) Thickness & 8-10mm Length

DOWNSIZE: 7-8mm is standard bar length and hoop diameter after healing for snug fit or if you prefer more fine jewellery choices, 6mm bar length.

HEALING TIME: 6-12 months for full healing as it is a cartilage piercing and tissue is thick and tough in this area. Initial stages of healing can be from 3-6 months.

PAIN LEVEL: Moderate pain at 5-7/10 on the scale. Pain depends on the individual.

AFTERCARE: Clean your piercings 2-3 a day with Saline solution and restrain from fiddling with the piercing. Avoid sleeping on the pierced side and it is best to wait until the piercing has healed before deciding to get another one.

PRO-TIP: Mixing metals or sticking to one colour are both great ways to show your personality. Try to find jewellery pieces that compliment each other and make your overall piercing curation sleek, neat and just what you want.
